description: Reference seed for Spring Boot / JPA — align field names with your Room entity and image paths under static or CDN.

rooms.roomDescription: Direct beach access, private terrace, and sunset views over the lagoon. King bed, outdoor rain shower, daily turndown.
Two queen beds, sofa corner, extra space. Connecting suites on request — ideal for two couples or friends travelling together.
Romantic suite with plunge tub, champagne welcome, and ocean-view balcony.
Separate sitting area, workspace, and premium linens for longer stays.
Glass floor panels, private deck with sea access, and butler service.
Top-floor views, full kitchen, dining for up to eight guests, and media room.
Two bedrooms, private gym access, and 24/7 concierge.
Terrace opens into the lagoon-style pool. King bed and poolside cabana.
Garden or partial sea view from a wide private terrace.
